name_en: 💖 Comes with full original green box packaging 💖. New suit jacket pocket features GG Supreme canvas with tonal leather trim, suitable for breast pocket. Black GG Supreme canvas, eco-friendly material. Black leather trim. Adhesive fiber lining. Oval interlocking double-G leather logo. 12 card slots. 4 bill compartments. Dimensions: 9*17.5cm. Color: Black/pvc. Model: 672947.
